summary: ينافس النجم المغربي إسماعيل صيباري، على جائزة أفضل لاعب في الدوري الهولندي، بعد موسم رائع مع ناديه آيندهوفن.
body: ينافس النجم المغربي إسماعيل صيباري، على جائزة أفضل لاعب في الدوري الهولندي، بعد موسم رائع مع ناديه آيندهوفن. وبرز صيباري، كواحد من أكثر لاعبي آيندهوفن، تأثيرًا خلال موسم 2025-2026، بعدما سجل 19 هدفًا وقدم 9 تمريرات حاسمة خلال 36 مباراة بكافة المسابقات. وذكر موقع Africa Soccer أن أداء صيباري الثابت في المباريات الحاسمة، جعله عنصرًا أساسيًا في تشكيلة آيندهوفن، الذي حسم التتويج بلقب الدوري الهولندي. وبوصوله إلى القائمة النهائية للعام الثاني على التوالي، يواصل صيباري، تأكيد مكانته بين نخبة اللاعبين في هولندا. وتضم القائمة النهائية أيضًا، زميله في آيندهوفن، جوي فيرمان، بجانب ميكا جودتس موهبة أياكس، وياكوب ترينسكوف مهاجم هيرنفين، وتيجارون شيري لاعب نيميخن. وسيتم الإعلان عن الفائز بجائزة أفضل لاعب في موسم الدوري الهولندي، خلال حفل مقرر إقامته يوم 25 مايو الجاري. اقرأ أيضًا لا معجزات.. نجم المغرب خارج كأس العالم رغم عودته Vijf uitblinkers. title: Leaked Xbox Elite 3 controller images show at least one oddball addition, but it'll struggle to compete in a radically changed market
summary: Gamepads are better, and cheaper, than they've ever been.
body: Earlier today, Brazilian tech outlet Tecnoblog published images of two unannounced Xbox controllers reportedly obtained from the country's telecommunications regulator. One is a small form factor gamepad designed for cloud gaming, resembling similar third-party gamepads by the likes of 8bitDo. The other is the successor to the Xbox Elite Controller 2. I've been looking forward to news about this gamepad because, since the last iteration released in 2019, the whole landscape for gamepads has changed. Nowadays a third-party gamepad with all the pro accoutrements—rear paddle buttons, interchangeable D-pads, replaceable sticks—can be had for bargain prices, or at least, well below the Series 2's $180 going price. The Gamesir G7 Pro , for example, which is in some ways more feature-rich, goes for $80. What can a titan like Microsoft do to stand out? Microsoft obviously hasn't announced this controller, we don't know its price, and we don't know the full extent of its features. But based on the images and Tecnoblog's intel from the regulator's documents, it's a curious beast, chiefly due to what resembles two scroll wheels on either side of the headphone jack. (Image credit: Tecnoblog) …

title: A PvE-only mode is coming to Marathon as Bungie lays out plans for seasons 3, 4 and 5
summary: "We want to evolve Marathon as a whole."
body: Marathon director Joe Ziegler has laid out Bungie's vision for the next few seasons of Marathon . If you're looking for a statement that confronts all the doomerism around the extraction shooter's Steam numbers or a followup on Sony's writedown of the studio's value, you won't find in Ziegler's latest communiqué. What you will find is a recap of how things are going in the game itself, including some big experiments in the works. The studio's working on a new map that "leans into alien elements and mind warping debuffs," for instance, but that's still way off. The next Runner shell is a defensive kit named Sentinel. But the most interesting of the reveals are undoubtedly two planned PvE-focused modes coming next season. "We want to evolve Marathon as a whole to be an experience where you can find more novel ways to play when you're stressed out from a nail-biting run and just need to cool off or have fun without the stress. Options where you can go full sweat or lean back and chill," Ziegler wrote. To that end, look out for the following sometime in season 2: In Season 2, we will be experimenting with two modes, one at the beginning of the season and one towards the middle/latter …

title: Subnautica 2 sells 1 million copies in its first hour, and I have to imagine the CEO of Krafton is pouring himself a very stiff drink right about now
summary: The scenario that Krafton humiliated itself to avoid seems to be coming true very quickly.
body: The Subnautica 2 early access launch that spawned so much recrimination (and so many billable hours) is finally here, and all that sweat and anger seems kind of funny in hindsight—because after all that drama, Subnautica 2 is good , and it's a hit, too. Subnautica 2 launched like a rocket on Steam, surging to more than 370,000 concurrent players in its first 30 minutes. That number would climb by another 100,000 before finally starting to ease off—not bad at all for a random Thursday in May. But it turns out that there are a great deal more people who own the game but just haven't played it yet, because they have to work at a popular PC gaming news site or whatever . Over 1 million Subnauts have already dived into Subnautica 2 🤯 We can't thank you enough for your support! — @subnautica.bsky.social ( @subnautica.bsky.social.bsky.social ) 2026-05-14T21:38:51.467Z The timing is notable: That post went up at 12 pm ET on May 14, one hour after Subnautica 2 launched. One hour! title: 2011 was packed with iconic games: Can you guess which ones we reviewed from a quote and the score?
summary: Even if you weren't playing them, you probably heard about them.
body: PC Gamer has been around for a long time now, and boy do we have the magazine archive to show for it. When you start sifting through the pile, some years stand out for their historical leaps in technology or gauntlet of big releases—looking at you, Baldur's Gate 3 summer—and then there's 2011. A lot happened in 2011. More quizzes! (Image credit: Larian Studios, PC Gamer) Want to keep testing your knowledge of gaming trivia? We've got loads more PC Gamer quizzes , on everything from healthbars to weird currencies to absurd patch notes. When it comes to new game releases, 2011 was a year for the books. I'm not going to start naming every new game that launched back then, lest I give away too many hints about the trial ahead, but I will say I still have a few 2011 games in my backlog. It's been 15 years, so it's probably time I admit I'm not going to play them, but I'm stubborn and still a constant victim of impulse Steam sale purchases. My bad financial decisions aside, to celebrate a year of bangers (and some tragic misfires), I've gone through the PC Gamer magazine archives and selected 17 reviews to quiz you on. title: صفعة على وجه الوزير الصهيوني.. رئيس حكومة إسبانيا يحمي يامال بموقف رسمي
summary: نجم برشلونة يحصل على تأييد رسمي في قضية رفع علم فلسطين
body: نجم برشلونة يحصل على تأييد رسمي في قضية رفع علم فلسطين أشعل رفع لامين يامال موهوب برشلونة، علم دولة فلسطين خلال احتفالات برشلونة بلقب الليجا معركة سياسية بين رئيس الوزراء الإسباني بيدرو سانشيز ووزير دفاع الكيان الصهيوني يسرائيل كاتس. وكان يامال قد رفع علم فلسطين أثناء مرور الحافلة المكشوفة لبرشلونة في شوارع المدينة احتفالاً بالتتويج بلقب الدوري الإسباني، وهو المشهد الذي أثار غضب كاتس. واتهم يسرائيل كاتس اللاعب بـ"التحريض على الكراهية ضد الكيان الصهيوني والشعب اليهودي"، مطالبا إدارة برشلونة بـ"التبرؤ من تصرفات لاعبها الموهوب". و جاء الرد سريعا وحاسما من رئيس الحكومة الإسبانية ، حيث كتب سانشيز عبر حسابه الرسمي على موقع "إكس": "أولئك الذين يعتبرون رفع علم دولة ما تحريضا على الكراهية إما أنهم فقدوا صوابهم أو أنهم أعمتهم دناءتهم الخاصة". وأضاف سانشيز مدافعا عن نجم برشلونة: "لامين يامال عبّر فقط عن التضامن مع فلسطين الذي يشعر به ملايين الإسبان، وهذا سبب آخر يدعو للفخر به". وكان برشلونة قد حسم لقب الدوري الإسباني بعد فوزه على ريال مدريد بثنائية نظيفة على ملعب الكامب نو، قبل أن يخسر مساء أمس أمام ديبورتيفو ألافيس بهدف دون رد في مباراة تحصيل حاصل.   Quienes consideran que ondear la bandera de un Estado es “incitar al odio”, o han perdido el juicio o han sido cegados por su propia igno…

title: بعد استبعاد كامافينجا.. مبابي يتفاعل مع قائمة الديوك
summary: تفاعل كيليان مبابي، نجم ريال مدريد، سريعًا مع إعلان قائمة منتخب بلاده الفرنسي، لنهائيات كأس العالم 2026.
body: تفاعل كيليان مبابي، نجم ريال مدريد، سريعًا مع إعلان قائمة منتخب بلاده الفرنسي، لنهائيات كأس العالم 2026. وتصدر مبابي، قائمة الديوك، التي أعلنها المدرب ديدييه ديشامب، فيما مثل استبعاد زميله إدواردو كامافينجا، المفاجأة الأبرز. وكتب كيليان مبابي، عبر حسابه على موقع إكس "كأس العالم، الجزء الثالث". وتابع "فخر هائل أن أتمكن مرة أخرى من تمثيل بلدي في أعظم بطولة على الإطلاق. سنحاول أن نجعلكم فخورين بنا". وأرفق مبابي، التغريدة، مع صورة له وهو يرتدي قميص المنتخب الفرنسي، أثناء طفولته، مع صورة صغيرة لمشاركته في مونديال 2018، وكذلك صورة لمشاركته في نسخة 2022. وتمكن مبابي من قيادة منتخب فرنسا، لحصد كأس العالم 2018 في روسيا، فيما نال فضية مونديال 2022 في قطر.  Coupe du Monde, Partie 3. Un fierté immense de pouvoir une nouvelle fois représenter mon pays dans la plus grande des compétitions. title: It took a while, but Overwatch's iconic heroes have finally been bitten by the collab slop curse
summary: Tracer, Mercy, D.Va, and Genji are now Fortnite skins.
body: Overwatch, one of the pioneers of the live service model, has finally come full circle with an official Fortnite collab this week . For years, Blizzard kept its iconic heroes close to its chest, but now they've been released, free to show up as premium cosmetics elsewhere in the live service multiverse. It already felt like Blizzard was becoming less precious with its Overwatch characters after spending the last three years flooding the hero shooter with brands like Transformers, G.I. Joe, and Porsche. Collab skins went from being sorta like cosplay to near-copies of characters from other games. In a world where Destiny 2 has a whole Star Wars-themed expansion and the stars of the Fallout TV show are earning killstreaks in Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 , anything is possible. So when the rumors of a Fortnite collab started a few months ago, they seemed plausible. And here we are: Mercy from Overwatch has officially hit the Griddy , Genji is dancing to Cardi B , D.Va is editing her way to a victory royale , and Tracer is blinking across the Sandy Strip. Overwatch heroes are now skins in the game that took what Blizzard started and turned it into the business model that every major publ…

title: وسط عواصف الغضب.. ريال مدريد يضمد جراحه بفوز شرفي
summary: انتصار يهدئ الأوضاع قليلا
body: انتصار يهدئ الأوضاع قليلا نجح ريال مدريد في تضميد جراحه مؤقتًا بعدما حقق فوزًا شرفيًا على ريال أوفييدو بهدفين دون رد، ضمن منافسات الجولة السادسة والثلاثين من الدوري الإسباني، في مباراة جاءت بعد أيام قليلة من خسارة الكلاسيكو أمام برشلونة، وهي الهزيمة التي منحت الفريق الكتالوني اللقب رسميًا وأشعلت غضب جماهير النادي الملكي. وشهد ملعب المباراة أجواء متوترة منذ الدقائق الأولى، بعدما أطلقت جماهير ريال مدريد صافرات استهجان ضد عدد من اللاعبين، وفي مقدمتهم كيليان مبابي وفينيسيوس جونيور، تعبيرًا عن غضبها من الموسم الصفري الذي خرج به الفريق، رغم التوقعات الكبيرة قبل بداية الموسم. وامتدت حالة الغضب إلى المدرجات، حيث دخل فلورنتينو بيريز، رئيس النادي، في مشادة مع بعض الجماهير التي حملته مسؤولية الانهيار المحلي والأوروبي، وظهرت لافتة تطالب برحيله عن منصبه. ورغم الأجواء المشحونة، تمكن ريال مدريد من حسم المباراة، حيث افتتح جونزالو جارسيا التسجيل في الدقيقة 44.   غونزالو غارسيا يفتتح التسجيل لريال مدريد ⚽️ #الدوري_الإسباني pic.twitter.com/qykYTdP8Qr — beIN SPORTS (@beINSPORTS) May 14, 2026 وأضاف جود بيلينجهام الهدف الثاني في الدقيقة 80 بتسديدة مميزة من خارج منطقة الجزاء. كما شهد اللقاء عودة مبابي للمشاركة في الشوط الثاني، لكنه فشل في ترك بصمة حقيقية. الفوز لم يغير شيئًا في واقع الموسم ال…

title: بالفيديو.. أمن سانتياجو برنابيو يتدخل ضد معارضي بيريز
summary: الأمن أزال اللافتة بالقوة
body: الأمن أزال اللافتة بالقوة تدخل أفراد الأمن في ملعب سانتياجو برنابيو، معقل ريال مدريد، مساء اليوم الخميس، لإزالة لافتة رفعتها بعض الجماهير خلال مواجهة ريال أوفييدو، ضمن منافسات الجولة 36 من الليجا. وكُتب على اللافتة: "فلورنتينو.. ارحل الآن"، في مطالبة صريحة لرئيس النادي الملكي بالاستقالة. اقرأ أيضًا وسط أطلال ريال مدريد.. مورينيو يطير فرحًا بموقف بيريز بعد واقعة علم فلسطين.. يامال يرد على فليك والمنتقدين كما دخل بيريز في مشادة كلامية مع بعض المشجعين في الملعب، في ظل حالة الغضب الجماهيري المتصاعد من نتائج الفريق هذا الموسم. وكان رئيس الريال قد أعلن مؤخرًا رفضه الاستقالة، داعيًا إلى إجراء انتخابات مبكرة لمجلس إدارة النادي، والتي سيخوضها آملًا في ولاية جديدة على رأس القلعة الملكية. ⚪ La seguridad del Bernabéu retira una pancarta de 'Florentino vete ya' pic.twitter.com/qKEX3LJFol — MARCA (@marca) May 14, 2026

title: موسم للنسيان.. الكوارث تتوالى على نجم ريال مدريد
summary: تتوالى المصائب على نجم ريال مدريد، الفرنسي إدواردو كامافينجا، بعد فترة صعبة للغاية مع الميرنجي.
body: تتوالى المصائب على نجم ريال مدريد، الفرنسي إدواردو كامافينجا، بعد فترة صعبة للغاية مع الميرنجي. وتأكد غياب كامافينجا عن نهائيات كأس العالم 2026، بعد استبعاده من قائمة الديوك، والتي أعلنها المدرب ديدييه ديشامب. وبرر ديشامب، قرار استبعاد كامافينجا، بأن الجانب الاحترافي، هو الذي يفرض نفسه في النهاية. وشارك كامافينجا مع منتخب بلاده في نهائيات كأس العالم 2022، حيث احتل الديوك، الوصافة، بعد الخسارة بركلات الترجيح أمام الأرجنتين. اقرأ أيضًا مصير كامافينجا؟ ديشامب يعلن قائمة فرنسا للمونديال هفوة قاتلة أمام بايرن ميونخ تعرض كامافينجا، لانتقادات قوية، بعد خروج ريال مدريد من دوري أبطال أوروبا، على يد بايرن ميونخ، في دور الثمانية. وكان ريال مدريد قد خسر ذهابا على أرضه بنتيجة 1-2، لكنه دخل لقاء الإياب بضغط هجومي كبير، لتصحيح الأمور. وتقدم ريال مدريد على بايرن ميونخ، بنتيجة 3-2، وكانت الأمور تسير نحو الذهاب للوقت الإضافي. لكن كامافينجا تعرض للطرد في الدقيقة 86 بعد هفوة ساذجة، كلفت فريقه الملكي، الكثير، حيث نجح بايرن ميونخ في إدراك التعادل، ثم إنهاء المباراة، فائزًا بنتيجة 4-3. صافرات استهجان.. وخروجه من حسابات الملكي تعرض كامافينجا، لصافرات استهجان من جانب ريال مدريد، أكثر من مرة هذا الموسم، بسبب تورطه في هفوات دفاعية مؤثرة. كما جرى وصف كامافينجا، بأنه "لاعب غير ملتزم"، بعد غيابه عن مباراة سيلت…

title: دموع كامافينجا وابتسامة كانتي.. ديشامب يبرر "قراراته النارية" بشأن قائمة فرنسا
summary: كامافينجا دفع ثمن موسمه الصعب!
body: كامافينجا دفع ثمن موسمه الصعب! وضع ديديه ديشامب حداً للتكهنات وأعلن القائمة النهائية لمنتخب فرنسا في كأس العالم 2026، والتي حملت مفاجآت من العيار الثقيل بين استبعادات مدوية وعودة أسماء صنعت المجد. و شهدت القائمة غياب إدواردو كامافينجا نجم وسط ريال مدريد ، إلى جانب لوكاس شوفالييه حارس باريس سان جيرمان، فيما عاد نجولو كانتي لاعب فنربخشة التركي، لقيادة خط الوسط مجددا بجوار كيليان مبابي وعثمان ديمبيلي. وبرر ديشامب استبعاد شوفالييه، في تصريحات نقلتها صحيفة "فوت ميركاتو" قائلاً: "أتفهم خيبة أمله، لكن لسوء الحظ لم يلعب منذ عدة أشهر، لقد تواصلت معه في مارس/ آذار الماضي على أمل أن يحصل على دقائق، لكن ذلك لم يحدث".  ولم يخفِ المدرب الفرنسي تفهمه لحزن كامافينجا، موضحا: "قادم من موسم صعب، لعب مباريات أقل وعانى من الإصابات، لا يزال شابا، لكن عليّ اتخاذ القرارات، هناك هيكلية للفريق ويجب توزيع اللاعبين بين الخطوط". في المقابل، أشاد ديشامب بمدافع كريستال بالاس ماكسينس لكرواكس، مؤكدا أن ضمه جاء "بفضل ما قدمه في معسكر مارس/ آذار الماضي، إنه يمنح الفريق بأكمله مزيدا من الثقة". أما عن عودة نجولو كانتي، فلم يتردد ديشامب لحظة: "إنه لاعب فريد، قدراته الرياضية حاضرة دائما، وهو دائما في أفضل حالاته، نجولو كما هو، يبتسم في الصباح، ويشعّ تألقا في فترة ما بعد الظهر أيضا". ويبدأ منتخب فرنسا مشواره في الم…

title: Subnautica 2 console commands: turn on god mode, unlock all blueprints, craft without resources, and change your FOV
summary: Modders have already unlocked Subnautica 2's debug console to allow you to use cheats.
body: Modders sure work fast, huh? Subnautica 2 has only just launched into early access and already there are mods for it, including a couple that a lot of players will be keenly interested in. If you were wondering if Subnautica 2 had a debug console like the original game, it doesn't—at least not officially. However, modders have uncovered a debug console and with a couple quick mod installs you can access it yourself, letting you use Subnautica 2 console commands to enable cheats like god mode, instant item spawning, and the unlocking of all blueprints and recipes. You can even change your FOV in Subnautica 2 using console commands, an option not included in the game yet. How to access Subnautica 2's debug console Download UE4SS for Subnautica 2 . Find your game installation folder (on Steam, right-click the game in your library, go to manage, then browse local files) Extract UE4SS to \Subnautica2\Subnautica2\Binaries\Win64 Download the Console Commands mod Extract it to \Subnautica2\Subnautica2\Binaries\Win64\ue4ss\Mods That's all you have to do. Start up Subnautica 2 again, and while playing press F2 to access the command console. When you press F2, you'll see a number of commands…

title: جدول ترتيب هدافي دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026
summary: تعرف على هدافي دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026
body: تعرف على هدافي دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026 أصبح دوري روشن السعودي هو الوجهة الأولى لعشاق كرة القدم العربية بل وتعدت شهرته حدود الشرق الأوسط ليصبح متابعًا عبر العالم. كل جولة تحمل معها مفاجآت وتقلبات، وسط تنافس محتدم بين الكبار الهلال والنصر والاتحاد والأهلي إلى جانب فرق طموحة تسعى لكسر الهيمنة التقليدية. ونجح الاتحاد في التتويج بلقب دوري روشن السعودي لموسم 2024–2025، لكن ذلك لم يمنع كريستيانو رونالدو من خطف الأضواء على المستوى الفردي، بعدما نجح في حسم صراع هداف دور روشن في الموسم المنصرم رغم تواجد النصر في المركز الثالث. ومن المتوقع استمرار المنافسة الشرسة على لقب الهدافين في دوري روشن السعودي مع انضمام ريتيجي للقادسية ونونيز للهلال ولاكازيت لنيوم بجانب وجود نجوم أمثال كريستيانو رونالدو وكريم بنزيما والبقية. وفي الأسطر التالية من كووورة نتعرف سويًا على ترتيب هدافي دوري روشن السعودي موسم 2025-2026. هدافي دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026: توني يغرد وحيدًا في الصدارة الترتيب اللاعب عدد الأهداف 1 إيفان توني - الأهلي 31 2 خوليان كينيونيس   - القادسية 30 3 كريستيانو رونالدو - النصر 26 4 روجر مارتينيز - التعاون 22 5 جواو فيليكس - النصر 20 6 جوشوا كينج - الخليج 19 =7 كريم بنزيما - الاتحاد \ الهلال 17 =7 يانيك كاراسكو - الشباب 17 =9 ماتيو ريتيجي - القادسية 16 =9 جورجينو فينالدوم - الاتفاق …

title: الأمور تتصاعد.. بيريز يشتبك لفظيًا مع بعض جماهير ريال مدريد
summary: جماهير الريال تندد بأوضاع النادي
body: جماهير الريال تندد بأوضاع النادي دخل رئيس ريال مدريد، فلورنتينو بيريز، في مشادة حادة مع بعض المشجعين في مدرجات "سانتياجو برنابيو"، خلال الشوط الأول من مباراة الميرينجي مع ضيفه ريال أوفييدو، مساء اليوم الخميس، ضمن منافسات الجولة 36 من الليجا. وأظهرت لقطات من ملعب المباراة بيريز يخوض جدالًا حادًا مع عدد من جماهير الفريق الملكي، الجالسين أسفل مقصورة سانتياجو برنابيو، دون أن يتضح سبب الخلاف على وجه التحديد. اقرأ أيضًا وسط أطلال ريال مدريد.. مورينيو يطير فرحًا بموقف بيريز بعد واقعة علم فلسطين.. يامال يرد على فليك والمنتقدين وشهدت المباراة أجواء سلبية بشكل عام من جانب جماهير الريال، التي استقبل قطاع منها حافلة الفريق بصافرات الاستهجان، وواصلوا ذات الأمر داخل الملعب، خصوصا ضد النجمين فينيسيوس جونيور وكيليان مبابي. كما رفع بعض المشجعين لافتة تقول "فلورنتينو.. غادر الآن"، قبل أن يتدخل أمن الملعب لإزالتها.

title: بذكريات الكأس التاريخية.. الكشف عن ثاني الصاعدين إلى دوري روشن
summary: الدوري السعودي يشهد عودة فريق جديد
body: الدوري السعودي يشهد عودة فريق جديد صاحبت ذكريات الكأس التاريخية ثاني الصاعدين إلى دوري روشن السعودي في الموسم المقبل 2026-2027، بعد فريق أبها. وكان أبها أول الصاعدين إلى الموسم المقبل من دوري روشن، في أبريل/نيسان الماضي، بعدما حصل على لقب دوري يلو السعودي للدرجة الأولى، قبل 4 جولات من نهاية المسابقة. وبعد نحو 3 أسابيع من صعود أبها إلى دوري روشن، صحبه فريق الفيصلي، عقب فوزه العريض على نظيره الباطن برباعية نظيفة، اليوم الخميس، في الجولة الرابعة والثلاثين والأخيرة من دوري يلو. الفوز رفع رصيد الفيصلي إلى 73 نقطة، يحتل بها المركز الثاني في جدول الترتيب، وهو المركز الذي يؤهل صاحبه بشكل مباشر إلى دوري روشن، ليُنهي حلم فريقي الدرعية والعلا، صاحبي المركزين الثالث والرابع، في التأهل المباشر. وسيكون على الدرعية والعلا الانتظار لخوض مباريات الملحق المؤهل لدوري روشن، إلى جانب ناديي العروبة والجبلين صاحبي المركزين الخامس والسادس. اقرأ أيضًا: غرائب النصر.. بحث عن أحلام برشلونة الوردية فأذاقه الهلال كوابيس الزمالك اقرأ أيضًا: فرصة رفضها الشباب ويحكمها الهلال.. هل يُتوج النصر بلقبين في يوم واحد؟ اقرأ أيضًا: بين الهلال والنصر.. جالتييه يكشف مرشحه للتتويج بالدوري السعودي الفيصلي يعود إلى دوري روشن بعد 4 سنوات قضاها في يلو، منذ هبوطه للمرة الأخيرة عقب نهاية موسم 2021-2022، حيث فشلت جميع محاولاته في ا…

title: حرب جديدة تشتعل.. باريس يقتحم صفقة مانشستر يونايتد المستهدفة
summary: لاعب برتغالي محط أنظار الكبار
body: لاعب برتغالي محط أنظار الكبار اسم جديد بدأ يفرض نفسه بقوة في سوق الانتقالات الأوروبية، بعد موسم أول لافت مع فريقه الإنجليزي جعله محط أنظار كبار القارة العجوز. ووفقا لما كشفته صحيفة "ذا أثليتيك" البريطانية، فإن باريس سان جيرمان انضم رسميا إلى قائمة الأندية المهتمة بضم ماتيوس فرنانديز، لاعب وسط وست هام يونايتد. وخطف اللاعب البالغ 21 عاما الأضواء منذ انتقاله من ساوثهامبتون الصيف الماضي مقابل 38 مليون جنيه إسترليني، حيث شارك في 40 مباراة هذا الموسم سجل خلالها 5 أهداف وقدّم 4 تمريرات حاسمة، ليؤكد أنه صفقة ناجحة بكل المقاييس مع "الهامرز". الاهتمام بفرنانديز لا يتوقف عند حدود باريس، فقد ذكرت شبكة "سكاي سبورت" أن مانشستر يونايتد كثّف تحركاته لضم اللاعب البرتغالي، ما ينذر بصراع محتمل بين عمالقة أوروبا على توقيعه الصيف المقبل. ورغم أن فرنانديز وقع عقدا لمدة خمس سنوات مع وست هام يتضمن خيار التمديد لعام إضافي، إلا أن اللافت أن عقده لا يحتوي على شرط جزائي، ما يعني أن أي نادٍ يرغب في ضمه سيكون مضطراً للتفاوض المباشر مع إدارة النادي اللندني. مع تألقه اللافت وصغر سنه، يبدو أن مستقبل ماتيوس فرنانديز سيكون أحد أبرز الملفات الساخنة في الميركاتو المقبل، وبين باريس ومانشستر قد تُحسم وجهته المقبلة.

title: جدول مباريات وترتيب الاتحاد في دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026
summary: كل ما تريد معرفته عن جدول مباريات الاتحاد في دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026 ونتائجه وترتيبه...
body: كل ما تريد معرفته عن جدول مباريات الاتحاد في دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026 ونتائجه وترتيبه... يدخل الاتحاد منافسات دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026، بشعار الحفاظ على اللقب الغالي الذي حققه في الموسم الماضي بعد مسيرة ذهبية، تحت قيادة مدربه الفرنسي لوران بلان. الاتحاد نجح في الموسم الماضي بالسيطرة على البطولات المحلية، حيث توج بدوري روشن السعودي وكأس خادم الحرمين الشريفين، ولديه طموحات كبرى في حصد بطولة قارية بعد حجز مقعده في دوري أبطال آسيا للنخبة. ويستهدف الاتحاد تحقيق لقب دوري روشن للموسم الثاني على التوالي معتمدًا على كتيبة من المحترفين بقيادة النجم الفرنسي كريم بنزيما، ومواطنه نجولو كانتي والبرازيلي فابينيو. ويرصد كووورة في السطور التالية جدول مباريات الاتحاد في دوري روشن السعودي ونتائج العميد وترتيبه أيضًا بين فرق المسابقة، مع تحديث مباشر بشكل مستمر بعد نهاية كل جولة. ما القنوات الناقلة لمباريات الاتحاد في دوري روشن السعودي 2025-2026؟ أعلن الاتحاد السعودي لكرة القدم رفقة رابطة الدوري السعودي للمحترفين ورابطة دوري الدرجة الأولى، منح حقوق بث بطولات مرة القدم المحلية، لصالح شركة "ثمانية للنشر والتوزيع". وأصبحت شركة "ثمانية" الناقل الحصري لمنافسات دوري روشن السعودي، كأس خادم الحرمين الشريفين، كأس السوبر السعودي ودوري يلو السعودي في الشرق الأوسط وشمال إفريقيا خلال الفترة من موسم 2025-2026…

title: بالفيديو.. الاتحاد يضع قدمه في نخبة آسيا بثلاثية على الاتفاق
summary: "النمور" نجحوا في الفوز خارج ملعبهم
body: "النمور" نجحوا في الفوز خارج ملعبهم وضع نادي الاتحاد قدمًا في النسخة المقبلة من بطولة دوري أبطال آسيا للنخبة، بعدما اقتنص فوزًا ثمينًا من مضيفه الاتفاق بدوري روشن السعودي. وفاز الاتحاد على الاتفاق بنتيجة 3-1، خلال المباراة التي جمعت بينهما، اليوم الخميس، على ملعب إيجو بالدمام، في الجولة الثالثة والثلاثين من دوري روشن. وافتتح حسام عوار التسجيل لـ"النمور" في الدقيقة الثالثة، قبل أن يضيف موسى ديابي هدفين في الدقيقتين 19 و79، بينما سجل خالد الغنام هدف الاتفاق الوحيد في الدقيقة 26. نحو نخبة آسيا الفوز رفع رصيد الاتحاد إلى 55 نقطة، ينفرد بها بالمركز الخامس في جدول ترتيب الدوري السعودي، وهو الذي يؤهل للدور التمهيدي من دوري أبطال آسيا للنخبة في الموسم المقبل. وأصبح الاتحاد على بعد 3 نقاط من التعاون الذي هبط إلى المركز السادس، مع تبقي مباراتين لكل فريق، ما يجعل حظوظ "النمور" في التأهل الآسيوي كبيرة للغاية. في المقابل، توقف رصيد الاتفاق عند 49 نقطة من 33 مباراة، ليفقد بشكل رسمي فرصة التأهل للنسخة المقبلة من البطولة الآسيوية. الاتحاد بدون مهاجم البرتغالي سيرجيو كونسيساو، المدير الفني لفريق الاتحاد، بدأ المباراة بدون مهاجم، في ظل استبعاد المغربي يوسف النصيري لأسباب فنية. واكتفى كونسيساو بالاعتماد على الجناحين؛ الفرنسي موسى ديابي والهولندي ستيفن بيرجوين، في الخط الأمامي، ومعهما صانع الألعاب ال…

title: مصير كامافينجا؟ ديشامب يعلن قائمة فرنسا للمونديال
summary: أعلن ديدييه ديشامب، مدرب المنتخب الفرنسي، مساء الخميس، قائمة الديوك، لخوض نهائيات كأس العالم 2026.
body: أعلن ديدييه ديشامب، مدرب المنتخب الفرنسي، مساء الخميس، قائمة الديوك، لخوض نهائيات كأس العالم 2026. واستدعى ديشامب، 26 لاعبًا لخوض آخر كأس عالم له، على رأس منتخب فرنسا. ونشرت صحيفة "ليكيب" قائمة الديوك، والتي شهدت غياب لوكاس شوفالييه وإدواردو كامافينجا وراندال كولو مواني. وقال ديشامب "أعلم أن الأمر صعب بالنسبة لبعض اللاعبين، لكن الجانب الاحترافي هو الذي يفرض نفسه في النهاية". واستدعى ديشامب، 25 لاعبًا سبق لهم ارتداء قميص المنتخب الفرنسي، بالإضافة إلى وجه جديد واحد فقط، وهو روبن ريسر، حارس لانس. ومثل غياب كامافينجا، نجم ريال مدريد، مفاجأة كبيرة، بعدما كان مرشحًا بقوة للمشاركة في المونديال حتى وقت قريب.  وجاءت قائمة منتخب فرنسا كالتالي: حراسة المرمى: مايك ماينان، بريس سامبا، روبن ريسر الدفاع: ويليام ساليبا، جوليس كوندي، إبراهيما كوناتي، أوباميكانو، لوكاس هيرنانديز، ثيو هيرنانديز، مالو جوستو، لوكاس ديني، ماكسينس لاكروا الوسط: أوريلين تشواميني، أدريان رابيو، وارن زاير إيمري، نجولو كانتي، مانو كوني الهجوم: كيليان مبابي، عثمان ديمبلي، ماركوس تورام، ميكيل أوليسيه، برادلي باركولا، ريان شرقي، جان فيليب ماتيتا، مجنيس أكليوش، ديزيريه دوي اقرأ أيضًا مصائب الريال تخدم كامافينجا قبل الكلاسيكو والمونديال Didier Deschamps a convoqué 26 joueurs pour sa dernière Coupe du monde à la tête de l&#3…

title: Garry Newman acknowledges Gmod successor S&box had a bumpy launch, but is baffled by the number of people complaining about NFTs, which aren't in the game: 'I have no idea what this s**t is about'
summary: "It's a UGC platform, there is always going to be dog sh*t."
body: The newly launched content creation platform S&box has 7,693 Steam reviews and they are decidedly "Mixed," though it definitely has its defenders. Facepunch co-founder and creator of Garry's Mod Garry Newman has now directly addressed the situation on the studio's blog, beginning by acknowledging that "our Steam reviews obviously aren't great. They're painful for us. They are showing us where we have made missteps in the release." Newman goes on to address some of the common themes in the negative reviews. "Around 35% of the reviews compare the game to Garry's Mod," says Newman . "They point out the differences between s&box and Garry's Mod, they wish it was more like Garry's Mod. I understand this, they wanted an iteration of Garry's Mod onto the Source Engine. They didn't want an engine and a platform." While I think everything Newman's saying here is reasonable, it is also worth pointing out that the first line of S&box's Steam description calls it "our spiritual successor to Garry's Mod," so I'm not enormously surprised that people are buying this with certain expectations. title: After all that drama, Subnautica 2 is good
summary: The early access survival game has emerged from the deep dark cave of corporate shenanigans it was stuck in, and it's a lot of fun.
body: Gathering metals and minerals and other crafting materials in Subnautica 2 got me thinking about how weird it is that so many useful things exist in the real world. Like, isn't it odd that something as good as metal exists? And fiber! Where would we be without rope? Certainly not playing Subnautica 2 on a computer. If rope weren't possible, I can't imagine we'd have gotten anywhere as a species. Half-baked thoughts that make me sound like a high creationist (I've only ever been one of those things, for the record) are to me a sign of a good survival game—or at least the kind that I like, in which I'm relaxed enough for my mind to wander, but entertained enough that it wanders to matters of material science and not, say, doing something else. Subnautica 2 is a decidedly well-balanced survival game. In a handful of hours of pre-release play, I've never found the scavenging and crafting grueling, but neither have I found it so easy that the expansion of my underwater base feels unearned. It's generous with intrinsic rewards, namely underwater caves to explore, glowing alien sea creatures to discover, and pretty extrasolar sunsets, and the survival and crafting systems are refined. body: Remothered: Red Nun's Legacy's latest trailer reveals more of what players can expect from the third installment of the survival horror series. This is the story of one mother's venture to find her lost daughter along with a group of other young girls, all of whom went missing in Sicily. The trailer picks up 14 months after the young girl went missing, as her mother Susan heads into the secluded and derelict Villa Ashmann in hopes of saving her daughter. Bad things, of course, ensue immediately. Before long she comes face to face with the Red Nun and her followers, who, may I just add, all give off big discount Silent Hill nun vibes. Aside from the villa, some nuns / nurses, an old lady with a gun, and the big bad herself, we don't get to see much more about what this game may entail. But by the looks of things it'll be a mix of survival and psychological horror. The twisting villa and demonic inhabitants also remind me of Layers of Fear, and while I wasn't the biggest fan of that game's story I did love its take on psychological horror with a mansion that could endlessly change in a blink of an eye. The end of the trailer reveals that we'll be getting another look at what it'll b…

title: Marvel Rivals has added a literal T. rex to the game alongside nerfing some Strategists and I don't know what's more surprising
summary: It can't see you if you stay completely still.
body: Marvel Rivals season 8 has begun and with it comes a new battle pass, patch notes , and a massive T.rex known as Devil Dinosaur. This dino is complete with seven passives, a shield, and a massive red laser beam, just as the cherry on top. But do you know what's better than a huge red T.rex? A bunch of Strategist nerfs. Well, they're not massive nerfs, but we'll take what we can get right now. Multiple Strategist characters have had their offense capabilities dialled down: Invisible Woman, Loki, Mantis, Rocket Raccoon, and White Fox have all been tweaked in this patch. Loki, Mantis, and Invisible Woman are getting damage nerfs: Loki's illusions will now "heal more reliably" and deal less damage while Mantis will provide a speed boost instead of a damage boost to allies, and Invis' knockback damage has also been dialled down. Loki's ultimate cost has also increased from 4300 to 4500, meaning it'll take a little more time for him to get his ult up and working for a team fight. This seems like a pretty decent move for both of these Strategists, and while I don't think either of these are among the most problematic cases, I'm always a fan of supports doing less damage output and focusi…

title: While I can barely find two sticks of 16 GB to rub together, Micron unveils a 256 GB memory module destined for AI servers
summary: The module is apparently "capable of speeds up to 9,200 megatransfers per second."
body: In the midst of a memory supply crisis , I am definitely thankful for the 32 GB of DDR5 that came inside my prebuilt rig a few moons ago now. Sure, 16 GB of RAM is fine for most things I'd want to dive into, but the AI industry is playing a whole other ball game. Case in point, I am sweating just thinking about Micron's 256 GB DDR5 server module. The Boise, Idaho-based memory manufacturer unveiled the tech on Tuesday. It's built on Micron's 1-gamma technology which, per the press release , "is capable of speeds up to 9,200 megatransfers per second (MT/s), greater than 40% faster than modules in volume production today." Samples of the registered dual in-line memory modules (RDIMM) are being offered "to key server ecosystem enablers for platform validation" in order to ensure wide-ranging compatibility. To simplify, Micron is offering its still somewhat experimental high-bandwidth memory for those hungry enough for chips that they'd be willing to help iron out the kinks, especially if it means "accelerating the path to production deployment for data center customers building AI and HPC infrastructure at scale". It's a typical 'move fast, break things' approach. For comparison's sak…

title: The latest Nvidia drivers reportedly fix stutters when using frame generation and VSync, so you can generate to your heart's content
summary: Capcom games seem among the biggest beneficiaries.
body: There's a chance that, if your games have been stuttering with DLSS frame generation enabled, it's because you have VSync on and didn't know the two don't always play nicely. If you're one of the unlucky few, you might want to try updating your Nvidia drivers. Game Ready Driver 596.49 has reportedly enhanced smoothness when the two are working together. When the discussion thread opened up on the Nvidia subreddit, this fix immediately met some support. As of the time of writing, the top upvoted comment says, "Huge if true, gargantuos if verifiable." Another account responds to this comment saying, "I can confirm it". Previously, on their RTX 4090 rig at Ultra settings with 2x frame generation, they reportedly saw noticeable micro-stutter and hitching and had to swap to FSR to fix the issue. Now, they claim 2x frame generation "works perfectly with vsync enabled." Not everyone is having such a great time, with one user saying it's still an issue for them and another saying Monster Hunter Wilds performs poorly for them. However, a third user points out that Monster Hunter Wilds performed poorly for them even without VSync and swapping to FSR helped. Capcom seem to get mentioned quit…

title: Subnautica 2 pulls over 370,000 concurrent players in its first 30 minutes on Steam as it cannonballs into early access
summary: We might need a bigger ocean.
body: Considering the length of its tenure as Steam's most-wishlisted game, it was safe to suspect that Subnautica 2 would draw a crowd. Now that its early access launch day is here, those suspicions have been thoroughly validated: Less than an hour after launch, its oceans are already packed with eager explorers. Within moments of Subnautica 2's launch time at 11 am Eastern, there were over 100,000 players in-game according to SteamDB data . 30 minutes later, that number had more than tripled to over 370,000 concurrent players. (Image credit: SteamDB) At time of writing, at 11:44 am Eastern, that number has crested another watermark: Steam's own Most Played chart lists 426,000 users currently playing Subnautica 2, meaning it's currently the fourth most popular game on the platform behind Counter-Strike 2, PUBG, and Dota 2. To put those numbers in context, Subnautica 2's concurrent player count is already in the neighborhood of Silksong's launch concurrent peak of 562,000—and it's done so without the benefit of Silksanity-induced collective mania . These are users being organically drawn by the siren call of a terrifying alien ocean. It's a clear sign of a successful launch, but there a…

title: How to digest food in Subnautica 2
summary: Can't figure out how to solve "digestive incompatibility" in Subnautica 2? Here's how to deal with your tummy troubles.
body: After you reach the surface and get to work making your new aquatic habitat a home, your Subnautica 2 adventure hits a snag: You can't digest any of this planet's lifeforms. Whatever fish you catch throw up warnings about " digestive incompatibility ." Mercifully, Subnautica 2 leaves the physical consequences of underwater indigestion to our imaginations, but you will have to solve this problem to progress. How to digest food in Subnautica 2 One of Subnautica 2's premises is that genetic code can spread between organisms, allowing you to adapt traits from local creatures to work with your human physiology. At the very start of the game, you stick your hand in a big glowing pod to adapt to the local pressure. You'll have to do this again to acquire the digestive enzymes you need to consume the plasticy flora and fauna around you. Explore your surroundings: As you explore and collect resources, you'll receive notices that your Noetic Adviser, aka NOA, has new observations for you. Access NOA via the Wheatley-like orb in your lifepod. An early NOA message titled "Missing Colonists" will inform you that there are 26 missing colonists for you to track down. A little later, in a message…

title: AMD now owns 38.1% of the overall x86 CPU market according to new research but actually lost ground in desktop PCs
summary: The CPU market giveth, and the CPU market taketh away...
body: AMD now owns fully 38.1% of overall market revenues for x86 CPUs according to new data from Mercury Research (via HotHardware ). That's up from 35.4% for the previous quarter . But AMD's desktop CPU market share actually fell. AMD is doing particularly well in the server market, where it won 46.2% of revenues and 33.2% of unit sales. That means AMD server CPUs, on average, are selling for quite a bit more than Intel CPUs. Those figures are up by around 3-4% on the previous quarter. AMD is also making up ground in laptops. Mercury's latest data puts AMD at 28.9% of overall revenues and 28.3% of unit sales. Its figures from the previous quarter are 24.9% of revenues and 26% of unit sales. Desktop CPUs represent the lone segment where AMD is slipping a little. For the latest quarter, Mercury has AMD pegged at 37.6% of revenues and 33.2% of unit sales. That's down from 42.5% and 36.4%, respectively, for the previous quarter, which were all time highs for AMD. Intel is, of course, AMD's only direct competitor in specifically the x86 CPU market, as opposed to the broader CPU market, which includes the likes of Arm and RISC-V chips. And desktop aside, it all looks like pretty good news f…

title: Control was destined to become an RPG franchise all along, says creative director: 'That's how Control was born'
summary: News to me, but I suppose non-Euclidean geometric brutalist Rome wasn't built in a day.
body: Control Resonant is going to be an RPG—that much we knew, with PCG's very own Robin Valentine being actively surprised by just how much of a Diablo-like it was when he saw it back in March. But did you know the Control series was always meant to be an RPG? Me either. Per creative director Mikael Kasurinen, who spoke with our friends over at GamesRadar+ during Gamescom Latam this year, it was always destined to become an RPG series. No, more than that—Control was actively the first step towards making it so. "When I was thinking about Control, and it wasn't called Control or anything like that, but I had this kind of thinking in my head that I wanted to create an RPG franchise," says Kasurinen, "The question was, 'What would it be? What's the Remedy version of that?' The way to learn is to start by doing, and that's how Control was born." Hearing Kasurinen talk on it, though, it seems like the plan wasn't to jump headfirst into RPG territory—but instead to figure out how to make the structure of an RPG without any of the usual elements: "There was a main story, but there's also these other stories as well. You had side quests. We'd never done that before. We'd never done dialog cho…

summary: You're saying boo-urns, right?
body: AI doesn't have the best rep. title: How Subnautica 2 multiplayer works
summary: Co-op features are a bit lacking, but hopefully that will change in early access.
body: Subnautica 2 launched into early access today, and at least one new feature makes it an improvement over the original: multiplayer. Up to four players can play Subnautica 2 in co-op, so you can have some company as you plumb the depths of the alien ocean world. We got our hands on Subnautica 2 a bit early, so we were able to experiment a bit with multiplayer, and the new system is lacking in certain ways but pretty generous in others. Here's how Subnautica 2's multiplayer works . First, I was able to host a multiplayer game and invite PC Gamer's US Editor-In-Chief Tyler Wilde into it. That was great for me: I could use the singleplayer saved game I'd already spent about 10 hours in, so my base, my gear, my quest progress, and my personal progress (like DNA enhancements) were all intact. Tyler, however, who was joining my game, had to use a brand new character with no progress. Subnautica 2 doesn't seem to work like a game such as Valheim, where you can bring existing characters and all their stuff into someone else's world. That's a bit disappointing—it would be great if Tyler could have taken his existing singleplayer character into my world with his gear, inventory, and progress…

title: In Subnautica 2, survival is a prison and humanity might be better off becoming something else
summary: It's not the only 2020s sci-fi wondering whether being "inhuman" is really so bad.
body: What if survival weren't optional? That is both a useful way to explain why you can respawn in a videogame, and one of two central questions in Subnautica 2 . The other is: Would morphing into some weird alien thing really be so bad? The highly-anticipated survival game is out in early access today, and after a handful of hours, I think it's a lot of fun. Like the original, Subnautica 2 is mainly about exploring an alien ocean, seeing cool, weird alien fish, getting eaten by cool, weird alien monsters, and building a cool (but not really weird) underwater base. Thumbs up to all of that so far : Subnautica 2 is refined for an early access survival game, more than a lot of 1.0s. (And it has co-op this time.) What's surprised me most, though, is that I've found the light narrative to be a highlight. Story is not what draws me to survival games, which I generally accept to be manifestations of the same old fantasy that gets people into homesteading, at least until they decide they've made a terrible mistake: The notion that you can flip civilization the bird and go live off the land, free from the incomprehensible network of mass-production that supports the other eight billion jerks …

title: Turn down these five Subnautica 2 settings from Epic to High for a massive frame rate boost
summary: Hello Lumen my old friend.
body: Subnautica 2 has just released into early access, and I'm already shaking in my boots. Despite having a deep distrust of the sea (and all the terrible things that live in it), I've been a very brave boy and spent some time testing the game's performance using two modern graphics cards: an 8 GB tiddler in the form of the lesser-VRAM-ed RTX 5060 Ti , and a whale-sized RTX 5080 . After swimming with the alien fishes, I'm pleased to report that Subnautica 2 is capable of running well on both—providing you're prepared to drop a few settings. The Epic preset can result in some crunchy frames, but turning down five key graphics options by a single notch can add up to a huge performance improvement overall. Those options are: Global illumination Shadows View distance Shading Effects Subnautica 2 has a fairly expansive settings menu at first glance, but there are a few omissions worth noting. For a start, there's no current FSR support, so AMD GPU owners will have to make do with TSR for upscaling duties until it's added in at a later date . Similarly, Nvidia owners can enable DLSS Frame Generation, but there's no alternative option for AMD or Intel users. And finally, the game looks to be…

title: How to get gold in Subnautica 2
summary: Fabricate Advanced Wiring Kits or Strong Acid with this material.
body: Finding gold in Subnautica 2 is a key part in crafting both an Advanced Wiring Kit and a System Chip (which the Advanced Wiring Kit is used to make). You'll also need gold if you want to build a Thermal Plant, one of the more reliable methods of producing for your base alongside the Hydroelectric Turbine, both of which definitely trump Solar Panels. Gathering gold requires a bit of progression, but that's fine since it's not a resource you're going to need super early on. All that said, here's how to get gold in Subnautica 2. Subnautica 2 gold location You can find gold in the volcanic vent region to the east of the Lifepod , but particularly on the rocks around the crashed colony ship exactly 450 meters to the east, though watch out for the big predatory fish that patrol the wreck. It's easy to tell when you enter this region, as a temperature gauge will appear in the centre of the screen and the water will take on an orange hue with sparks floating in it. Before you can mine gold, you'll need to acquire the Heat Tolerance adaptation to even enter this region without burning to a crisp. You can get this by destroying the Angel Comb about 200 meters to the northwest of the Lifepod…

title: How to get silver in Subnautica 2
summary: Scrounge up some shiny silver to craft a better air tank.
body: Tracking down silver in Subnautica 2 is your first challenge where crafting materials are concerned. You'll need this metal to craft the air tank, which will let you stay underwater longer, and as you've likely surmised, breathing is kind of important in this game—I guess it's always important, but especially so in this game. You also use silver to craft wiring kits, so it's vital for their advanced versions, as well as system chips, and dedicated cores, all of which you use to build important base facilities, as well as the Tadpole vehicle. All that said, here's the best place to get silver close to the Lifepod where you start, and more generally where to find more of it. Subnautica 2 silver location Just like all of the other metals and minerals in Subnautica 2, you can find smaller nodes of silver which you can collect by hand, or much bigger ones, which will require the Sonic Resonator to mine. The first of these you're likely to encounter is while searching for Chap's black box, just in the cave next to his habitation. You can grab small pieces of silver or smash bigger blocks (Image credit: Unknown Worlds) More generally, you'll find silver in caves close to the Old Habitat …

title: How to get quartz in Subnautica 2
summary: One of the most basic crafting materials.
body: Quartz is one of the first and most important materials you'll need to find in Subnautica 2 , since it's used to make some vital tools. This includes the Scanner, which is how you unlock basically every major blueprint, from the Sonic Resonator to the Wakemaker and Tadpole . But finding quartz isn't easy when you're thrust into a monster-infested ocean with no idea what you're looking at. So here's where you should loot to get your first quartz, as well as how to stock up on the stuff en masse. Subnautica 2 quartz location Unknown Worlds Unknown Worlds Quartz is a white crystal which you can find in small chunks on and inside coral domes on the ocean floor, including under the Lifepod . These orange and green domes are easy to spot, and there are loads of them to the northwest of the Lifepod. Grabbing these quartz chunks by hand is enough to craft basic tools like the Scanner and to make glass to craft the Habitat Builder. There are also medium-sized crystals that you can smash with your Survival Multitool that'll give you a few more quartz at a time. However, you'll soon need to find quartz wholesale, and that's when you're looking for large quartz crystals, which you'll need to …

title: How to increase inventory size in Subnautica 2
summary: Find these Biobed locations to haul more materials across the ocean.
body: You start with just 20 inventory slots and five hotbar spaces in Subnautica 2 , which you'll fill up in a matter of minutes. After that, you'll be juggling storage chests and trying to find any nook and cranny to stow all your junk. So, finding out how to increase your inventory size is a high priority early on. The good news is that you can actually increase your inventory and your hotbar space, though it'll take a bit of work. While you're at it, I recommend building the Wakemaker and getting some O2 upgrades to make life easier. How to increase inventory size in Subnautica 2 Unknown Worlds Unknown Worlds You can increase your inventory space by interacting with the terminal next to Biobeds inside colony outposts . Any time you see a blue lightstick, I recommend investigating the area, as there's likely a habitat you can explore containing a Biobed, a scannable tool, or other items you can collect. The black boxes you're sent to recover by NOA also lead you to various locations with Biobeds, too. Biobeds are typically used to reset your spawn point (though these are closed beds), so it's easy to overlook that the computer terminal attached to it actually provides you with a perm…

title: How to get the Sonic Resonator and mine in Subnautica 2
summary: The 'unknown tool' you need is a deep-sea jackhammer.
body: Early on in Subnautica 2 , you'll be grabbing ore by hand. It's painfully slow, and you can't mine the big ore veins you'll come across with your basic tools—it'll say an "unknown tool is required". That's where the Sonic Resonator comes in. This heavy-duty mining tool can blast large ore deposits like titanium, silver , and lead with ease, letting you collect valuable materials en masse—which you'll need once you start building bases and more complex tools. You can also use it to destroy Bloom Biofilm . How to get the Sonic Resonator and mine in Subnautica 2 This is the Old Habitat where you can find three Sonic Resonator fragments. Unknown Worlds The first Sonic Resonator fragment in the Old Habitat. Unknown Worlds The second Sonic Resonator fragment in the Old Habitat. Unknown Worlds A Sonic Resonator fragment in the cave next to the Lifepod. Unknown Worlds You need to scan just two Sonic Resonator locations to unlock it as a craftable blueprint. These are the locations I've found, and it's more than enough: There are two inside the Old Habitat around 370 meters to the north of the Lifepod, where you'll find Quaker's black box for an early task. The first is directly to your ri…

title: How to get Acidic Raion Pouch in Subnautica 2
summary: This brain-like worm colony makes for a good battery, apparently.
body: Finding an Acidic Raion Pouch is one of your first goals in Subnautica 2 , since you'll need it to make the basic battery required for a scanner. And the scanner is arguably your most important tool, since it's used to unlock more blueprints, like the Wakemaker and Sonic Resonator . Luckily, you don't actually have to go too far to find Acidic Raion, and once you know where to look, you can keep going back for more as it respawns periodically. Just note that you need to craft a Survival Multitool and bring it with you to harvest it, though I'd be surprised if you left this essential tool back at base. How to get Acidic Raion Pouch in Subnautica 2 Unknown Worlds Unknown Worlds You can harvest Acidic Raion Pouches from purple brain-shaped plants , appropriately named Acid Raion, often found in caves. There are multiple pouches on each Acidic Raion, so you tend to only need one or two plants' worth at a time. At the centre of the plant, you'll find a Medical Gel Sack, too. Make sure to never take the Medical Gel Sack until you've cut away the Acidic Raion Pouches , as it'll spew out burning acid into the water if you do. There are multiple Acidic Raion spawns close to your starting L…

title: The best Subnautica 2 base locations
summary: Where to build your undersea HQ.
body: You've just splashed down in Subnautica 2 and your first order of business after finding the Habitat Builder is to begin constructing your undersea base. But where should you build it? There's mystery and danger in every direction, so you might need some help zeroing in on the best Subnautica 2 base locations . Ideally, you'll want to be close to harvestable resources like titanium and quartz—you're gonna need plenty of both to build your base, after all—but also useful materials like copper, silver, and lead. Powering your base is also a concern, because solar power will only keep the lights and oxygen on during the day, so being close to a strong ocean current to generate electricity with a turbine is important. Starter area base location 1: Under the lifepod For your first base, I recommend doing what I and pretty much everyone else at PC Gamer did: build right under or next to your lifepod . While you're scrimping to stretch your meagre resources, the pod will serve as an extra room with storage and a fabricator, and since it's above the surface of the water, it'll supply you with endless oxygen. It's also got NoA, your AI, and a respawn point: why spend the resources to rebui…

title: How to get Strong Acid in Subnautica 2
summary: Harvest Necrolei Cysts to craft this Power Cell component.
body: Crafting Strong Acid in Subnautica 2 is a key part of producing a Power Cell, something you'll need if you want to get a Tadpole mini-sub up and running. Unlike Mild Acid, which is easy to acquire using the Acidic Raion organisms you find all over, you'll have to venture further afield to gather the Necrolei Cysts for its stronger counterpart. You'll also need a Processor facility to craft it, but luckily, you can find everything you'll require for that in one neat little location. How to get Strong Acid in Subnautica 2 You'll first need a Processor facility to craft Strong Acid, which means scanning one to unlock it as a blueprint. You can find one in the Old Habitat about 350 meters to the north of the Life Pod—NOA will actually send you here to track down a black box, provided you locate the others it asks you to first. While you're near the Old Habitat, it's also worth gathering the Necrolei Cysts you need to craft the Strong Acid. You can harvest these turquoise flowers in the jellyfish forest . As shown in the video above, you head north from the Life Pod until you start noticing a blue-ish hue and tentacled Jelly Lei structures appearing on either side. You can hack the Nec…

title: How to build a base in Subnautica 2
summary: Unlock the Habitat Builder to start your undersea outpost.
body: It's usually pretty obvious how to build a base in a survival crafting game, but less so than you would've thought in Subnautica 2 . In order to construct your underwater habitat and get out of the cramped Life Pod, you'll first need to unlock a specific tool called the Habitat Builder, and you do this by scanning two of them in a variety of locations around the map. Once you have your Habitat Builder, you can construct your base wherever you want, large aquatic predators willing. Below I'll show you where to find two Habitat Builders and explain the basics of base building. How to unlock base building in Subnautica 2 First off, you'll have to unlock the Habitat Builder tool in order to construct a base, and that requires you to find and scan two such devices out in the world. You'll want to craft a Scanner in the "Personal" section of the Life Pod fabricator for: 2x titanium 2x quartz 1x basic battery You can craft the battery in the 'Resources' section for two copper and one Acidic Raion Pouch . Once that's done, I suggest that you head to the Welcome Center colony ruin just to the southeast of the Life Pod, as there are two Habitat Builders to scan here. You can see their locat…

title: How to build a Tadpole in Subnautica 2
summary: Get yourself a mini-submersible to explore the seabed.
body: Sailing about in a Tadpole is one of the best parts of Subnautica 2 , and it's certainly nice to have the protection and extra oxygen when you're exploring more hostile waters. Zooming about under the sea, while sitting snugly behind a plate of glass, is how the ocean was meant to be enjoyed, though that won't stop local fauna trying to pry you out of there like a tasty morsel. As with any new tool or gadget, you'll have to scan Tadpole fragments in different locations, then set up a variety of apparatus in your base to accommodate it. All that said, here's how to get a Tadpole in Subnautica 2. Subnautica 2 Tadpole scan locations You'll have to scan three Tadpoles with your Scanner in order to unlock it as a craftable blueprint. I've found five of them in the early areas of the game, so here are the most efficient to grab. 1. The Old Habitat This one is just north of the Old Habitat colony ruins, which are around 370 meters due north of the Lifepod. NOA will send you here to find Quaker's black box at this location. Once you arrive at the ruins, head northwest a little way up the ravine to find a crashed Tadpole, close to the entrance to the ruins themselves. While here, make sure…

title: How to get salt in Subnautica 2
summary: Build a Power Cell, but also some delicious jerky.
body: Tracking down salt in Subnautica 2 can be a little tricky, which is frustrating, since it's a vital ingredient in the Power Cell that you'll need to craft to build a Tadpole vehicle. This mini-sub is vital for further exploration of the alien ocean, so until you find salt, you ain't going far. Well, you might try to go far, but you'll likely get chomped by some abyssal horror you can't outrun. You can also use salt to craft delicious jerky, though this seems like a waste to me considering it replenishes the same hunger as regular food, and grub doesn't seem to spoil in Subnautica 2. Either way, here's how to get the salt you need. Subnautica 2 salt location The easiest place to find salt early on is in a cave roughly 200 meters to the southeast of the Lifepod . This is right by where Chap's black box is, which NOA will send you to find after you recover Anita's one. To get here: Head exactly southeast from the Lifepod, past the Welcome Center on the right and down into the area with the two pillars and the giant Coral Crab on the left To your right, you'll spot a pillar with a standing light in front of it—head to the base of the pillar where you'll find an entrance to a small cav…

title: I've spent over 30 hours in Subnautica 2—here are my top 20 quick tips to get started under the sea
summary: Adjust to your new underwater life and avoid getting chomped.
body: Getting started in Subnautica 2 can be a little overwhelming at first. Whether it's your lackluster lung capacity meaning you have to surface often, or your inability to digest all these colourful alien fish, there's a lot to do, and it's not clear what's worth prioritising first. That was my experience with the game anyway, back when I started 30ish hours ago. Below, I've laid out my top tips in terms of what I recommend prioritising first to get yourself established. Where possible I've also linked our associated guides to walk you through resources and scan location, plus how to craft vital tools, so you can flourish in this water world. Subnautica 2 tips 1. Secure a source of food and drink Check Lifepod storage for some starter supplies. Water is fabricated with Water Slugs, while you can get the Adaptation to digest fish at the underwater tree north-north-west of the Lifepod. 2. Scan everything you see Your trusty scanner is how you unlock fancy new tools, but also facilities for your base, including rooms and even posters. It'll also teach you about the creatures you find. 3. Carry at least two Air Bladders Even after you start crafting O2 upgrades , Air Bladders are a fant…

title: How to increase O2 in Subnautica 2
summary: Expand your oxygen capacity so you can dive deeper.
body: Increasing your O2 capacity is one of the first things you'll want to do in Subnautica 2 . After all, it gets a bit annoying having to constantly resurface to gulp in air when you're trying to accomplish basic tasks. Your overall oxygen level is the game's real progression system, determining how deep you can dive and what rare resources are in your reach. There are many different methods to boost your O2 and punch above your weight when under the sea, so here's how to acquire and use each of them. How to increase oxygen capacity in Subnautica 2 There are a number of ways to boost your oxygen, so here they are in order of when they'll be useful to you and accessible: Oxygen Tunics, Bloom Sap funnels, and air pockets You can get O2 from Oxygen Tunics or by cutting Bloom Sap out of O2-filled funnels (Image credit: Unknown Worlds) Your first port of call for breathing longer underwater is the Oxygen Tunic. Despite how it sounds, this isn't a piece of gear, but is a blue blob-like organism that spits oxygen bubbles into the water. If you swim into these, you'll refill your O2 as well as your Air Bladders. While exploring, you'll also find little funnels that are blocked by Bloom Sap. …

title: How to get fibrous pulp in Subnautica 2
summary: Hiding in plain sight.
body: Fibrous pulp is a weird resource in Subnautica 2 , since it's basically everywhere—you never have to go far to find some. But since there are so many objects that can give you fibrous pulp, it's hard to keep track, especially because a lot of it blends in with the scenery. Nevertheless, it's required to make basic oily salads (delicious), and you can use it to fabricate fiber and fiber mesh, an ingredient for Basic Fins and the Rebreather. So here's how you get it without much effort. Subnautica 2 fibrous pulp location This is what whip gorgon looks like. Unknown Worlds This is feather kelp. Unknown Worlds And this is macaron sponge. Unknown Worlds You can harvest fibrous pulp by chopping various types of plants using a Survival Multitool, including feather kelp, whip gorgon, and macaron sponge . At the start of the game, I recommend cutting the whip gorgon beneath the Lifepod, which looks like thick red tufts of tentacle grass, though it blends in with almost identical yet unharvestable seagrass. Another good location is inside a cave on the sea floor, just 100 meters northwest of the Lifepod, where you'll find tons of feather kelp growing from the rocks that you can chop away at…

title: How to get lithium in Subnautica 2
summary: You'll need this material to acquire the High Capacity Air Tank.
body: Locating lithium in Subnautica 2 will prove significantly more challenging than finding titanium, lead , or gold . That's because this rare metal only seems to appear in one location early in the game. Thankfully, though, you don't require much of it to craft anything you find at first. Lithium is also somewhat perilous to gather since it involves swimming into a giant mouth and essentially grabbing some before it closes—scary, right? If you're prepared to brave this massive maw, here's where to get lithium. Subnautica 2 lithium location You can only get lithium at The Great Jaw early on in the game. Before you can, though, you'll need a few things: To unlock the Sonic Resonator To unlock the Standard Air Tank I also recommend bringing some Air Bladders for backup O2 and crafting the Basic Fins, plus the Wakemaker mobility gadget, since you'll need to move fast. To reach The Great Jaw: Head southwest from the Lifepod over the drop-off in the ocean floor and follow the crater wall on your right side You'll pass by some colony wreckage and spot a ruined colony building ahead and below you Just outside this building, on a table, you'll find your first piece of lithium in a fragment o…

title: How to get lead in Subnautica 2
summary: Find this metal to craft the Sonic Resonator.
body: Looking for lead in Subnautica 2 is a tad trickier than finding titanium. Though it's not quite as involved as gathering gold , this metal is still relatively hard to find, and I've only discovered it in one particular area in the game's starting regions. It's not used to craft much apart from the Sonic Resonator , but this tool is massively important. Not only is it vital for mining big metal and mineral blocks, but it's also used to clear Angel Combs so you can earn new adaptations for surviving in this alien sea. So, here's where to find lead so you can rustle one up. Subnautica 2 lead location You can find lead in a ravine about 280 meters northeast of the Lifepod. To get here, follow the video above, or: Head northeast from the Lifepod (bearing about 75°) until you spot a blue natural current moving below you. Swim into it and you'll be propelled down into a ravine—stop when you spot the colony platform construction on the left with the Tadpole fragment nearby. You'll spot some big block lead deposits here, but if you swim further north or east down either side of the ravine, you'll find little bits of lead in the sand you can pick up or smaller blocks to break. Lead isn't re…

title: How to get the Wakemaker in Subnautica 2
summary: All the Wakemaker parts you can scan to unlock this speedy gadget.
body: One of your main goals in Subnautica 2 is crafting new tech to help you swim faster and stay underwater for longer. The Wakemaker is your first major upgrade in this department after getting an oxygen tank and some flippers, but it's not immediately obvious how to get it. Like with other tools and tech, such as the Sonic Resonator used to mine large ore deposits, you need to find and scan the item in multiple locations to learn the blueprint. Unlike the Sonic Resonator, though, you can't grab all the Wakemaker fragments in a single location. How to get the Wakemaker in Subnautica 2 You need to scan three Wakemaker fragments to unlock it as a craftable blueprint . These are the locations I've found so far, which I demonstrate how to reach in the video above: In a box next to a science lab platform just past the broken ship 15° north of the Lifepod, but very close, at 30m depth On a desk on a science lab platform in the open seabed (near the Coral Crabs) about 120° southeast of the Lifepod, roughly 25m deep and 200m away In a box on a science lab platform on a cliff, 45° northeast of the Lifepod, about 20m deep and 200m away Once you've scanned enough Wakemaker parts, return to an i…

title: How to build rooms in Subnautica 2
summary: Too many corridors.
body: Wondering why your first base in Subnautica 2 is all just corridors? Before you can build rooms in this submersive survival crafter, you'll need to unlock the room recipe, which can be a surprisingly big limitation early on. You're going to need space to fit your facilities, after all, not to mention anything larger like a Tadpole moonpool if you want a vehicle. The 'Room' structure is surprisingly versatile, though. You can create bigger rooms by placing them next to each other, and even shave off little chunks to get the perfect size, assuming you've unlocked the Habitat Builder , that is. How to unlock rooms in Subnautica 2 As far as I've found, there are two ways to unlock the basic 'Room' structure blueprint: Scanning a Processor to unlock its blueprint Acquiring the 'Room recipe data card' Thankfully, there's a place you can do both, and even grab the High Capacity Air Tank recipe at the same time. This location is slightly deeper down, so I'd recommend crafting the Standard Air Tank, acquiring some Air Bladders, and maybe even crafting the Wavemaker so you can move faster down there. As shown in the video above: Go southwest from the Lifepod over the edge of the cliff and f…

title: How to remove Bloom Biofilm in Subnautica 2
summary: Break this organic web to get at the loot behind.
body: Removing Bloom Biofilm is one of many environmental hazards you'll have to deal with in Subnautica 2 . This tough, web-like organic gunk seemingly enjoys blocking doorways to various colony ruins, which is especially annoying when you're hoping to get inside so you can scan and steal everything in sight. Two of the ruins I accessed by clearing the film also contained some really fun posters that I immediately scanned and put up in my base, so keep your eyes peeled for those. How to get past Bloom Biofilm in Subnautica 2 You'll have to use the Sonic Resonator to blast the Bloom Biofilm to remove it (Image credit: Unknown Worlds) You can remove Bloom Biofilm with the Sonic Resonator tool. All you need to do is take it out and then hold the right mouse button (or RT on controller) to charge the blast. Once the meter on either side of the reticle is fully filled, release it while aiming at the obstruction. This will destroy the film, allowing you to get through whatever previously blocked doorway you were trying to access—usually a colony ruin with some tasty gadgets and posters to scan inside. As detailed in the linked guide above, you unlock the Sonic Resonator by scanning it in at …

title: How to get sulfur in Subnautica 2
summary: Track down this bright yellow crystal to craft a Repair Tool.
body: Despite how easy it actually is to get sulfur in Subnautica 2 , I was completely stumped when I suddenly needed to get just one piece to craft the Repair Tool. And it's an important item to get, since you can use it to break open a nearby wreck and unlock the Rebreather item. Below, I'll explain where you can quickly find your first sulfur, and you'll get more than enough for the time being. However, you will need the Sonic Resonator to collect it in bulk, which you should have by now if you're concerned about sulfur. Subnautica 2 sulfur location Unknown Worlds Unknown Worlds Sulfur is a yellowish rock (technically a crystal) that could be easily mistaken for gold . The best place to find sulfur early on is on the rock pillar in the open seabed near the Coral Crabs about 120° southeast of the Lifepod, roughly 25m deep and 200m away , past the Welcome Centre. You might've found a Wakemaker fragment on the science platform at its base before, and there's also a great source of salt nearby. There are four large sulfur deposits requiring the Sonic Resonator to mine, and a few small ones you can grab by hand here, netting you a good basketful of the yellow crystal. There are also a few…

title: Printer-based scheme attempted to smuggle $8,967,742 worth of cocaine into Australia
summary: Paper jam detected.
body: I'm all for finding fresh use for ancient hardware, but not quite like this: this week, a 47-year-old man from Victoria, Australia, has been sentenced to nine years in prison after participating in a plot to smuggle cocaine into the country inside printers. The scheme attempted to smuggle 22.4kg of cocaine inside a consignment of five printers. Australian Federal Police intercepted the shipment when it arrived in Melbourne back in 2017, discovering 10 bricks of the white stuff hidden within the printers' paper trays (if you've ever worked in an office, you know that's the last place anyone would ever look). After testing the contents, the police replaced the cocaine with a substitute and then tracked the printers' journey all the way to a factory in Airport West, Victoria. Four men were ultimately arrested on the grounds of attempting to "possess a commercial quantity of a border controlled drug", per the AFP press release . One of these men was sentenced to 10 years imprisonment in 2022, with another also sentenced to 10 years back in 2025. The aforementioned 47-year-old was sentenced on May 8, and is the third conviction in the case. A fourth man was ultimately found not guilty …

title: Nvidia's solution to the AI energy problem is mini data centers next to local power substations and, of course, selling even more GPUs
summary: AI hardware coming to your neighborhood...
body: That something as superficially straight forward as plain old energy supply is turning out to be a major limiting factor in the AI revolution is one of those delightful unexpected quirks that keeps us all on our toes. Who'd have thought in just a few short years the world would be spooling up more GPUs than the power grid can cope with? One possible partial solution, apparently, is moving those GPUs nearer to the actual power supply. This is something Nvidia and a gang of collaborators plan to pilot later this year in the form of roughly 25 small data centers located next to power substations in the USA . Now, at first glance, you might think this is a bit of a zero sum game. How would putting GPUs nearer the actual power supply reduce the amount of power required? Nope, it's not reduced losses from shorter cables or anything like that. Indeed, it's not about reducing power consumption at all. Instead, the idea is load balancing. In other words, across a group of substations power load will vary, some experiencing heightened demand, others less so. What Nvidia and its partners plan to do is ramp up compute at the small data centers near substations under lesser load while trimming…

title: AMD bringing FSR 4.1 ML-powered upscaling to RX 7000 series in July, RX 6000 series in 2027
summary: Modders and Sony proved it possible. Now AMD is making good with official support.
body: It's been a long time coming but AMD has announced it is bringing FSR Upscaling 4.1 to 7000/6000 series graphics cards. In a tweet , the company's GM of computing and graphics and VP, Jack Huynh, said it will roll out FSR 4.1 on 7000-series cards (RDNA 3) this July. Anyone with a 6000-series card (RDNA 2) will have to wait a while longer. FSR 4.1 will be available sometime in "early 2027". As a lifelong gamer, I spend a lot of time thinking about how to push gaming experiences forward across CPUs, GPUs, software, and games.My team and I have been working hard to evolve @AMD FSR 4 and bring it to more cards.We power over 1 billion gaming devices worldwide. It’s… pic.twitter.com/91Z3vXpQap May 14, 2026 The company had previously limited support for the newer, smarter upscaling technology to the latest 9000-series graphics cards. It harnesses machine learning, similar to Nvidia's DLSS, to improve results. Specifically, the version currently available on the 9000 series (RDNA 4) is designed for FP8 support on RDNA 4's 2nd Generation AI Accelerators. The 1st Generation AI Accelerators found in RDNA 3 support INT8 (8-bit integer), and not FP8 (8-bit floating point). AMD also introduced …

title: IO Interactive has forgiven me for calling 007 a smug tool
summary: I am absolved of my sins until at least my next article.
body: A couple of weeks ago, after spending a few hours with 007 First Light , I suggested that maybe James Bond—while pretty enjoyable on film—is perhaps just a touch too much an insufferable Bullingdon Club boy to be a tolerable videogame protagonist. This was universally regarded as an excellent take, and absolutely no one got upset. One particular group that wasn't upset? 007 First Light studio IO Interactive, who told Eurogamer recently that—so far as it's concerned—a few people getting annoyed by Bond means it's done its job right. "Everyone has their favorite Bond," said senior combat designer Tom Marcham. "If we made a Bond where no one had any opinions on them, it would be the dullest Bond ever made. So the fact that we've got a little controversy on that, I think it's a good thing. "I think every time a new James Bond is cast it's talked about in every part of Britain, so let's have it happen to us." Plus, First Light's narrative and cinematic director Martin Emborg noted that, for IO's youthful take on Bond, a lot of the braggadocio he displays will go through the wringer as the game progresses: "He's a reckless young man. This guy hasn't seen death in the way that an older B…
